description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The build_and_test job runs in the default stage using the registry.gitlab.com/signal9/cpp-env image, caches the .conan/ directory, sources /bootstrap.sh, creates a stage directory, adds Conan remotes (signal9, bincrafters, grafikrobot), runs conan install -u -b missing .., executes patch_pcs, configures Meson with --buildtype=release and -Dbuild_demo=true, builds with ninja, and finally displays the size of the Conan cache with du -sh $CONAN_USER_HOME/.conan. The upload_conan job runs in the default stage using the alpine image, updates apk, installs python3 build-base curl git, downloads get-pip.py, installs pip, uses pip to install Conan for the user, adds the signal9 Conan remote, authenticates with $CONAN_USERNAME and $CONAN_PASSWORD, and runs tools/upload_conanfile.sh to upload the package. No explicit stages, artifacts, caches beyond .conan/, or rules are defined.
